summary: Spec review accepts the Stage 6 Harbor write-precheck runtime facts batch as bounded refs-only target/form/guard truth for issues #137, #138, #139, and #140.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test`; `pnpm smoke:runtime`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps Harbor as runtime/session/evidence refs owner, limits the batch to refs-only writable target, form state, sensitivity/export policy, and no-submit guard facts, and excludes true submit, hosted browser, production pages, persistent capture expansion, Core run truth, Lode package truth, and App UI.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The planned implementation is limited to Runtime API fixture facts, tests, smoke output, and item-specific Loom carrier for HARBOR-137.
